page_title: Parent Training and Information Center (PTIC) | ASK Resource Center
evidence_snippet: ASK Resource Center has been Iowa's Parent and Training Information Center (PTIC or PTI) since 1998. PTIs are also referred to as Parent Centers.
review_notes: Exact same-domain PTI leaf found from the live sitemap after the generic About page failed the designation gate.
Leaf preserves explicit Iowa PTI identity and duration on the fetched first-party page.
